title: COMPOST: THERMOPHILIC COMPOST
subtitle: This factsheet contains complementary information to the Best4Soil video on Compost: Thermophilic Compost
description: A factsheet providing complementary details to the Best4Soil video on thermophilic compost production. It outlines the process requirements, including feedstock mixtures, technological equipment, regulatory considerations, and quality control for aerobic hot composting.
